delete.description:
Delete an employee.

Args:
- employee_id: Employee ID to delete
- hard_delete: If True, permanently delete from database. If False (default), soft delete (mark as deleted)

Query params:
- hard_delete=true  ΓåÆ Permanently remove from database
- hard_delete=false ΓåÆ Soft delete (mark as deleted, keep in DB)

get.description: Get the role of an employee by employee ID

Monthly attendance for the signed-in employee.
Returns absent days for the month if enrolled but no punches.
Returns [] only when the employee has no ZKT machine enrollment.

schema.title: Response My Attendance Api V1 Attendance Me Get

get.description:
Today's logical attendance record.
Returns null when outside the shift window or not enrolled.

schema.title: Response My Attendance Today Api V1 Attendance Me Today Get

get.description: Monthly summary: Present / Late / Early / Absent / Leave / Rate.

Enriched logical attendance records for admin/HR views.

Each record includes:
  id, employee_id (machine), employee_db_id (Employee.id),
  employee_name, f_name, l_name, designation,
  department_id, department_name, employment_status, image,
  date, status, in_time, out_time, hours, attendance_mode

Only employees present in the system Employee table are returned.
ZKT entries for ex-employees or test machine slots are excluded.

parameters.name: month

schema.description: YYYY-MM ΓÇö strongly recommended to avoid huge payloads

parameters.description: YYYY-MM ΓÇö strongly recommended to avoid huge payloads

get.description:
Organisation-wide (or department-scoped) attendance summary.

Returns:
  {
    present, late, early, absent, leave,
    total_records, total_employees, rate,
    by_department: [{ department_id, department_name, present, total, rate }]
  }

Counts only employees that exist in the Employee table.

Application counts by status, scoped to the caller's visibility.

HR / CEO / Super Admin ΓåÆ organisation-wide
HOD                    ΓåÆ their department
Employee               ΓåÆ their own

List applications visible to the caller.

Results are enriched with employee_name, department_name, and
actioner names so the frontend table has everything it needs
without extra requests.

schema.description: HR only ΓÇö filter to one dept

schema.title: Response List Applications Api V1 Applications  Get

post.description:
Submit a new application.
employee_id is taken from the JWT ΓÇö not the request body.

get.description:
Full detail for one application.
Returns 403 if the caller does not have visibility rights.

patch.description:
Edit your own application ΓÇö only while it is Pending.
Once the HOD or HR has acted, the application is locked.

delete.description:
Soft-delete an application.

Employee: own + Pending only (withdrawal)
HR / Admin: any application

post.description:
Head of Department first-level review.

ΓÇó Application must be Pending.
ΓÇó Caller must be level 6 (HOD).
ΓÇó Applicant must be in the HOD's department.
ΓÇó HOD cannot action their own application.

approve ΓåÆ HOD_Approved (enters HR inbox)
reject  ΓåÆ HOD_Rejected (terminal)

HR / CEO / Super Admin final decision.

ΓÇó Caller must be level 1, 2, 3, or 4.
ΓÇó Application must be Pending (no HOD exists) or HOD_Approved.
ΓÇó HOD_Rejected applications cannot be reversed here.

approve ΓåÆ Approved  (terminal Γ£ô)
reject  ΓåÆ Rejected  (terminal Γ£ù)

get.description:
Employee-facing policy list.
Returns only Active policies the employee's audience can see,
annotated with acknowledged=True/False for THIS employee.

schema.title: Response My Policies Api V1 Policies My Get
Response My Acked Policies Api V1 Policies My Acked Get
Response List Policies Api V1 Policies  Get

post.description:
HR submits a Draft policy for CEO review.
Transitions: Draft ΓåÆ Review

CEO approves a Review policy.
Policy remains in Review status; HR must separately publish it.
CEO sends a Review policy back to Draft with a rejection note.

HR publishes a CEO-approved policy: Review (approved) ΓåÆ Active.
Will fail with 400 if CEO has not yet approved.

get.description:
Returns active, non-expired notices scoped to the employee's
audience (all / their dept / their role / selective by id).
Includes acknowledged=True/False per notice.

schema.title: Response My Notices Api V1 Notices My Get
Response My Acked Notices Api V1 Notices My Acked Get
Response List Notices Api V1 Notices  Get

ApplicationCreate.description:
Submitted by the employee.
employee_id is injected by the router (from JWT), not from body.

ApplicationListItem.description:
Lightweight shape for the admin table.
employee_name and department_name are injected by the CRUD layer.

AttendanceBulkCreate.description: Schema for bulk attendance creation from ZKT machine

DepartmentReadSchema.title: DepartmentReadSchema
DepartmentReadSchema.description: Minimal department schema for nested read

EmployeeLeaveBalanceResponse.title: EmployeeLeaveBalanceResponse
EmployeeLeaveBalanceResponse.description: Schema for all leave balances of an employee

EmployeeNoticeItem.title: EmployeeNoticeItem
EmployeeNoticeItem.description:
Returned by GET /notices/my ΓÇö includes acknowledgement status
for the requesting employee.

EmployeePolicyItem.title: EmployeePolicyItem
EmployeePolicyItem.description:
Shape returned by GET /policies/my ΓÇö employee-facing list.
Includes whether THIS employee has acknowledged the policy.

EmployeeRead.title: EmployeeRead
EmployeeRead.description: Full employee read schema with relationships

HODActionIn.title: HODActionIn
HODActionIn.description:
Body sent by a Head of Department when reviewing a pending application.
action = "approve" | "reject"
rejection_reason is required when action = "reject".

HRActionIn.title: HRActionIn
HRActionIn.description:
Body sent by HR (or Super Admin / CEO) for final decision.
Can act on Pending (direct, when no HOD) or HOD_Approved applications.

PolicyApprove.title: PolicyApprove
PolicyApprove.description: CEO approves a policy in Review status.

RoleReadSchema.title: RoleReadSchema
RoleReadSchema.description: Minimal role schema for nested read

ShiftReadSchema.title: ShiftReadSchema
ShiftReadSchema.description: Minimal shift schema for nested read
